REPLY MEMORANDUM OF P/A IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CHARTERED CALIFORNIA CITY AND COUNTY
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-09-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT BOARD OF APPEALS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION CONTINUED FROM FEB-23-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAR-09-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. PETITIONER GAVE NOTICE TO OTHER SIDE THAT HE PLANNED TO ARGUE THE TENTATIVE RULING, HOWEVER, NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN UNTIL, 4:45 PM AND THE LOCAL RULE 8.3 STATES THAT NOTICE BY SIDE PLANNING TO ARGUE, MUST BE GIVEN TO THE OTHER SIDE BY 4:00 PM THE PRECEDING DAY. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE, AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO MARCH 9, 2009. MR.O'LEARY TO GIVE NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE DATE TO COUNSEL FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY WRITING AND PHONE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT BOARD OF APPEALS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. Appearances: Timothy F. O'Leary, Esq. of O'Leary & O'Leary LLP, (415) 247-7900, appearing for Petitioner, and opposing party; Kristen Jensen, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-4615, appearing for Respondent, CCSF, Board of Appeals of the CCSF, and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: OBJECTIONS TO REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OVERRULED. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/BD)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2009 Continued To Mar-09-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT BOARD OF APPEALS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. Appearances: Timothy F. O'Leary, of O'Leary & O'Leary, LLP, appearing for Petitioner, (415) 247-7900, and opposing party; There are no other appearances. Petitioner gave notice to other side that he planned to argue the tentative ruling, however, notice was not given until, 4:45 pm and the local rule 8.3 states that notice by side planning to argue, must be given to the other side by 4:00 pm the preceding day. The Court vacated its tentative, and continues the matter to March 9, 2009. Mr.O'Leary to give notice of continuance date to counsel for the City and County of San Francisco, by writing and phone. (302/CWW/BD) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
